gist.headline: Daily Hive Update
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just swept through the README to keep the latest news and community apps fresh.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the most up-to-date community highlights and news.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) and Polly the bee organizing a bulletin board or updating a sign. The robot is pinning up new pictures of community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the cute bee mascot pinning new pictures to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
